rules.title: City Business License
rules.description: All businesses operating within city limits must obtain a City Business License before commencing operations. Annual fee: $110. Renewable annually.

rules.title: State Business License (UBI)
rules.description: A Washington State Unified Business Identifier (UBI) number is required for all business entities. Obtained through the Secretary of State.

rules.title: Workers Compensation Insurance
rules.description: Businesses with 1 or more employees (including owners in some structures) must carry Workers' Compensation insurance through L&I or a self-insured program.

rules.title: General Liability Insurance
rules.description: Commercial general liability insurance with a minimum coverage of $1,000,000 per occurrence is required for all food service and public-facing businesses.

rules.title: DBA Registration
rules.description: If operating under a trade name (DBA — 'Doing Business As'), the name must be registered with the county. Filing fee: $5.

rules.title: Sales Tax Registration
rules.description: Businesses selling tangible goods or prepared food must register for a Sales Tax Permit with the Department of Revenue. No fee.

rules.title: Liquor License
rules.description: Serving or selling alcoholic beverages requires a Washington State Liquor License. Processing time: 6-8 weeks. Application fee: $176.

rules.title: Mobile Food Unit Vendor License
rules.description: A separate Mobile Food Unit Vendor License is required in addition to the standard business license for all mobile food operations. Annual fee: $275.
